title: Mynawoo: Learn any language — through your own mother tongue | Product Hunt
excerpt: Most apps entertain you — Mynawoo teaches you. A grammar-first, AI-powered classroom that helps you learn any language through your native tongue — with real lessons, speaking, writing, listening, and smart flashcards that make it stick.
content_html: Most apps entertain you — Mynawoo teaches you. A grammar-first, AI-powered classroom that helps you learn any language through your native tongue — with real lessons, speaking, writing, listening, and smart flashcards that make it stick.
content_text: Most apps entertain you — Mynawoo teaches you. A grammar-first, AI-powered classroom that helps you learn any language through your native tongue — with real lessons, speaking, writing, listening, and smart flashcards that make it stick.

sentences.en: A grammar-first, AI-powered classroom that helps you learn any language through your native tongue — with real lessons, speaking, writing, listening, and smart flashcards that make it stick.
sentences.zh: 语法优先、人工智能驱动的课堂，可帮助您通过母语学习任何语言 - 提供真实课程、口语、写作、听力和智能抽认卡，让您记住语言。

content_html_zh: 大多数应用程序都能娱乐您——Mynawoo 教您。 语法优先、人工智能驱动的课堂，可帮助您通过母语学习任何语言 - 提供真实课程、口语、写作、听力和智能抽认卡，让您记住语言。
